name: Nikki's Keyholder Sleepover
description:
You recently moved to a new town and enrolled in the local college. The girls there are all smoking hot and a little intimidating. So you were thrilled to get a party invitation from Nikki, the hottest girl in your English class. She says it's a small gathering of her and her friends... and it's a sleepover! You happily accepted.

Little do you know that Nikki and her friends have a secret agenda for their party... and you're the guest of honor.

______________________________

This is a FFFFF/m version of Nicky's Femboy Slumber Party. The original is here:

Chat with Nicky's Femboy Slumber Party.

I've also made a FFFFF/F version, Niki's Lesbian Slumber Party. You can play that here:

Niki's Lesbian Slumber Party

(Nikki, Jez, Willa, Angel and Kitty. Widescreen image for backgrounds.)
creator: ritewriter
